Event: Act 1: Overgrowth
Aroma of Chaos
column3: Transform a card in your Deck.
Upgrade a card in your Deck.

Event:
Byrdonis Nest
Can only occur if you do not have an event pet
column3: Gain 7 Max HP.
Add Byrdonis Egg to your Deck.
Notes: While Byrdonis Egg is in your deck you can select Hatch as a Rest Site action, which removes Byrdonis Egg and adds a Byrd Swoop to your deck.

Event: Dense Vegetation
column3: Lose 8 HP. Gain 61 - 99 Gold.
Heal 30% Max HP. Fight 4 Wrigglers.
Notes: Receive regular combat rewards after the fight.

Event: Jungle Maze Adventure
column3: Gain 135 - 165 Gold. Lose 18 HP.
Gain 35 - 65 Gold.

Event:
Luminous Choir
Can only occur if you have 150 gold or more
column3: Remove 2 cards from your Deck. Add Spore Mind to your Deck.
Pay 100 - 150 Gold. Obtain a random Relic.

Event:
Morphic Grove
Can only occur if you have at least 2 transformable cards.
column3: Lose ALL Gold. Transform 2 cards.
Gain 5 Max HP.

Event: Sapphire Seed
column3: Heal 9 HP. Upgrade a card in your Deck.
Enchant a card with Sown.
Notes: Sown: The first time you play this card each combat, gain 1 energy.

Event: Tablet of Truth
column3: Lose 3 Max HP. Upgrade a random card.
Notes: Followed by a choice between Continue Deciphering and Give Up.

column3: Heal 20 HP.
Lose 6 Max HP. Upgrade a random card.
Notes: Followed by a choice between Keep Deciphering and Give Up.

column3: Lose 12 Max HP. Upgrade a random card.
Notes: Followed by a choice between KEEP DECIPHERING and Give Up.

column3: Lose 24 Max HP. Upgrade a random card.
Notes: Followed by a choice between Lose Everything and Give Up.

column3: Set your Max HP to 1. Upgrade ALL of your cards.
Leave.

Event:
Unrest Site
Can only occur if you are missing 30% of your max HP or more
column3: Heal to full HP. Receive Poor Sleep.
Lose 8 Max HP. Obtain a random Relic.

Event: Wellspring
column3: Procure 1 random Potion.
Notes: Random potion is generated uniformly (all potions equally likely regardless of rarity).

column3: Remove 1 card from your Deck. Add 1 Guilty to your Deck.

Event:
Whispering Hollow
Can only occur if you have 50 gold or more
column3: Lose 26 - 44 Gold. Procure 2 random Potions.
Notes: Random potions are generated following rarity chances.

column3: Lose 9 HP. Choose a card to Transform.

Event:
Wood Carvings
Can only occur if you have a starter card in your deck
column3: Choose 1 starter card to Transform into Peck.
Enchant 1 card with Slither.
Notes: Slither: When you draw this card, randomize its cost from 0 to 3.

column3: Choose 1 starter card to Transform into Toric Toughness.

Event: Act 1: Underdocks
Abyssal Baths
column3: Gain 2 Max HP. Take N damage.
Notes:
N = 3 + # times Immerse has been selected previously.
Followed by a choice between Immerse and Exit Baths.

column3: Heal 10 HP.
Leave.

Event: Doors of Light and Dark
column3: Upgrade 2 random cards.
Remove 1 card from your Deck.

Event: Drowning Beacon
column3: Procure Glowwater Potion.
Obtain Fresnel Lens. Lose 13 Max HP.

Event:
Endless Conveyor
Can only occur if you have 120 gold or more
column3: Pay 40 Gold. Receive a boon based on the [Dish]. Continue Feasting!
Notes:
Followed by a choice between Grab [Dish] off the Belt and Leave.
Dish is generated randomly from allowed options according to their weights. To find the chance for each dish in a particular roll, take its weight divided by the total weight of all allowed options.
Cannot select the same dish twice in a row.

column3: Gain 4 Max HP.
Notes: Weight = 6.

column3: Heal 10 HP.
Notes: Weight = 6. Only allowed if you are missing HP.

column3: Add a random Colorless Card to your Deck.
Notes: Weight = 3. Colorless card uses base rare chance with no offset (so almost always will be uncommon).

column3: Gain 75 Gold.
Notes: Weight = 1. Only allowed after the 1st dish.

column3: Transform 1 card in your Deck.
Notes: Weight = 3.

column3: Add Feeding Frenzy to your Deck.
Notes: Guaranteed to be offered every 5th dish. Otherwise is not allowed.

column3: Upgrade a random card in your Deck.
Notes: Weight = 3.

column3: Procure a random potion.
Notes: Weight = 3. Only allowed if you have an empty potion slot. Random potion is generated uniformly (all potions equally likely regardless of rarity).

column3: Upgrade a random card in your Deck.
Leave.

Event:
Punch Off
Can only occur on floor 6 or higher
column3: Add Injury to your Deck. Obtain a random Relic.
Fight 2 Punch Constructs.
Notes:
Receive regular combat rewards after the fight, plus an extra potion and a relic.
Extra potion is generated following potion rarity chances and does not affect potion chance. If the regular potion roll drops a potion then you will receive two potions.

Event:
Spiraling Whirlpool
Can only occur if you have an enchantable basic Strike or Defend in your deck
column3: Enchant a Strike or Defend with Spiral.
Notes: Spiral: This card gains Replay 1.

column3: Heal 33% Max HP.

Event: Sunken Treasury
column3: Gain 52 - 67 Gold.
Gain 303 - 363 Gold. Receive Greed.

Event:
Trash Heap
Can only occur if you have 6 HP or more
column3: Lose 8 HP. Obtain a random forgotten Relic from the past.
Notes: Forgotten relics: Darkstone Periapt, Dream Catcher, Hand Drill, Maw Bank, The Boot

column3: Gain 100 Gold. Obtain a random forgotten card from the past.
Notes: Forgotten cards: Caltrops, Clash, Distraction, Dual Wield, Entrench, Hello World, Outmaneuver, Rebound, Rip and Tear, Stack

Event:
Waterlogged Scriptorium
Can only occur if you have 65 gold or more
column3: Gain 6 Max HP.
Pay 55 Gold. Enchant a card with Steady.
Notes: Steady: This card gains Retain.

column3: Pay 99 Gold. Enchant 2 cards with Steady.

Event: Act 2: Hive

Amalgamator
Can only occur if you have at least 2 basic Strikes and 2 basic Defends
column3: Remove 2 Strikes. Add Ultimate Strike to your Deck.
Remove 2 Defends. Add Ultimate Defend to your Deck.

Event: Bugslayer
column3: Add Exterminate to your Deck.
Add Squash to your Deck.

Event: Colorful Philosophers
column3: Receive 1 Common card pack, 1 Uncommon card pack, and 1 Rare card pack from the selected character's card pool.
Notes: 3 random (unlocked) characters are selected for the card pool options.

Event:
Colossal Flower
Can only occur if you have 19 HP or more
column3: Gain 35 Gold.
Gain 75 Gold.
Gain 135 Gold.
Enter deeper. Lose 5 HP.
Notes: Followed by a choice between Extract Nectar (2) and Reach Deeper (2).

column3: Enter deeper. Lose 6 HP.
Notes: Followed by a choice between Extract Nectar (3) and Reach Deeper (3).

column3: Obtain Pollinous Core. Lose 7 HP.

Event:
Field of Man-Sized Holes
Can only occur if you have an enchantable card (cards can only have 1 enchantment)
column3: Remove 2 cards from your Deck. Add Normality to your Deck.
Enchant a card with Perfect Fit.
Notes: Perfect Fit: Whenever this would be shuffled into your Draw Pile, place it on the top instead.

Event: Infested Automaton
column3: Obtain a random Power.
Notes: Generated using regular rare and uncommon chance with no offset (so will almost always be uncommon).

column3: Obtain a random 0 cost card.
Notes: Generated using regular rare and uncommon chance with no offset (so will almost always be common or uncommon).

Event: The Lost Wisp
column3: Add Decay to your Deck. Obtain the Lost Wisp.
Gain 45 - 75 Gold.

Event: Spirit Grafter
column3: Heal 25 HP. Add Metamorphosis to your Deck.
Lose 10 HP. Upgrade a card.

Event: The Lantern Key
column3: Gain 100 Gold.
Fight the Mysterious Knight to obtain the Lantern Key.
Notes:
Mysterious Knight is the same as a Flail Knight (from the Knights elite in Act 3: The Glory), but starts with 6 Strength and 6 Plating.
If you have the Lantern Key in your deck, the first ? room you enter in Act 3 will be the War Historian, Repy event.

Event:
Zen Weaver
Can only occur if you have 125 gold or more
column3: Pay 50 Gold. Add 2 Enlightenment to your Deck.
Pay 125 Gold. Remove 1 card from your Deck.
Pay 250 Gold. Remove 2 cards from your Deck.

Event: Act 3: Glory
Battleworn Dummy
column3: Fight a 75 HP dummy. Procure 1 random Potion.
Notes:
Whichever setting you pick, you must defeat the dummy within 3 turns to earn the reward.
Random potion is generated uniformly (all potions equally likely regardless of rarity).

column3: Fight a 150 HP dummy. Upgrade 2 random cards.
Fight a 300 HP dummy. Obtain a random Relic.

Event:
Grave of the Forgotten
Can only occur if you have a card with Exhaust.
column3: Obtain Forgotten Soul.
Notes: Forgotten Soul (relic): Whenever you Exhaust a card, deal 1 damage to a random enemy.

column3: Add Decay to your Deck. Enchant a card that Exhausts with Soul's Power.
Notes: Soul's Power: This card loses Exhaust.

Event: Hungry for Mushrooms
column3: Obtain Big Mushroom.
Notes: Big Mushroom (relic): Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 20. At the start of each combat, draw 2 fewer cards.

column3: Obtain Fragrant Mushroom.
Notes: Fragrant Mushroom (relic): Upon pickup, lose 15 HP and Upgrade 2 random cards.

Event: Reflections snoitcelfeR
column3: Downgrade 2 random cards. Upgrade 4 random cards.
Notes: Can upgrade a card that was just downgraded.

column3: Duplicate your Deck. Receive Bad Luck.

Event:
The Round Tea Party
Can only occur if you have at least 12 HP.
column3: Obtain Royal Poison. Heal to full HP.
Lose 11 HP. Obtain a random Relic.

Event: Tinker Time
column3: Create a custom card to add to your Deck.
Notes: Followed by choosing the card type from two of the three options Protector, Weapon, and Power.

column3: Make a Skill. Base effect: 1 energy, gain 8 block.
Notes: Followed by choosing the secondary effect from two of the three options Chaos, Energized, and Wisdom.

column3: Add a random card into your Hand. It is free to play this turn.
Notes: Upgrade adds Innate.

column3: Gain 2 energy.
Draw 3 cards.
Make an Attack. Base effect: 1 energy, deal 12 damage.
Notes: Followed by choosing the secondary effect from two of the three options Choking, Sapping, and Violence.

column3: Whenever you play a card this turn, the enemy loses 6 HP.
Notes: Upgrade adds Innate.

column3: Apply 2 Weak. Apply 2 Vulnerable.
Hits 2 additional times.
Make a Power. Base effect: 1 energy.
Notes: Followed by choosing the secondary effect from two of the three options Curious, Expertise, and Improvement.

column3: Powers cost 1 less energy.
Notes: Upgrade adds Innate.

column3: Gain 2 Strength. Gain 2 Dexterity.
At the end of combat, upgrade a random card.

Event: The Trial
column3: Serve as today's Decider.
Notes: Followed by a choice between DECIDE: Guilty and DECIDE: Innocent, with three variations depending on the defendant (Merchant, Noble, or Nondescript Woman).

column3: Add Regret to your Deck. Gain 2 random relics.
Add Shame to your Deck. Upgrade 2 cards in your Deck.
Heal 10 HP.
Add Regret to your Deck. Gain 300 Gold.
Add Doubt to your Deck. Gain 2 card rewards.
Add Doubt to your Deck. Transform 2 cards.
You are not allowed to Reject.
Notes: Followed by a choice between Accept and Double Down

column3: Abandon the run.

Event: Shared

The Sunken Statue
Can only occur in Act 1
column3: Obtain the Sword of Stone.
Gain 101 - 121 Gold. Lose 7 HP.

Event:
Brain Leech
Can only occur in Acts 1 and 2
column3: Choose 1 of 5 random cards to add to your Deck.
Notes: Cards are generated using regular rare/uncommon chance without offset.

column3: Lose 5 HP. Gain a Colorless card reward.
Notes: Uses regular rare/uncommon chance without offset.

Event:
Crystal Sphere
Can only occur in Act 2 and 3 if you have at least 100 gold
column3: Pay 50 Gold. Divine 3 times.
Notes:
Both options enter the Crystal Sphere minigame. Divining uncovers squares in the grid. Any fully uncovered items are gained as rewards.

List of items in the Crystal Sphere (and their size, width x height):
1 relic (4 x 4)
2 common potions (1 x 3)
1 rare potion (2 x 2)
1 common card reward (2 x 2)
1 uncommon card reward (2 x 2)
1 rare card reward (2 x 2)
1 Doubt (2 x 2)
5 piles of 10 gold (1 x 1)
2 piles of 30 gold (2 x 1)

column3: Gain a Debt. Divine 6 times.

Event:
Doll Room
Can only occur in Act 2
column3: Obtain a random Doll Relic.
Notes:
Doll relics:
Bing Bong: Whenever you add a card to your Deck, add one additional copy.
Daughter of the Wind: Whenever you play an Attack, gain 1 Block.
Mr. Struggles: At the start of your turn, deal damage equal to the turn number to ALL enemies.

column3: Lose 5 HP. Choose 1 of 2 Doll Relics.

Options (initial options bolded): Examine Each and Make the Best Choice
column3: Lose 15 HP. Choose 1 of 3 Doll Relics.

Event:
The Merchant???
Can only occur in Acts 2 or 3 if you have at least 100 gold or a Foul Potion
column3: Start each combat with 4 Block.
Notes: 6 random knockoff (???) relics will be offered for 42-57 gold each.

column3: At the start of each combat, heal 1 HP.
Notes:
You can throw a Foul Potion to fight the Fake Merchant. If you win you get the following rewards:

  - 300 gold
  - All the knockoff relics he was selling
  - Merchant's Rug???
  - A regular combat roll for a potion
  - A regular card reward.

column3: Every 5 turns, gain 1 energy.
Upon pickup, heal 10% of your HP.
Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 3.
Poor imitation. Does nothing.
If you end your turn without Block, gain 3 Block.
Start each combat Confused.
Cards containing “Strike” deal 1 additional damage.
Whenever you enter a Rest Site, start the next combat with an additional energy.

Event:
Potion Courier
Can only occur in Acts 2 or 3
column3: Procure 3 Foul Potions.
Notes: Foul potions can be thrown at the Merchant to gain 100 gold, or at the Fake Merchant to trigger the Fake Merchant fight.

column3: Procure 1 random Uncommon Potion.

Event:
Ranwid the Elder
Can only occur in Acts 2 or 3, and only if you have at least 100 gold, a tradable relic, and a potion
column3: Obtain a random Relic.
Obtain a random Relic.
Obtain 2 random Relics.

Event:
Relic Trader
Can only occur in Acts 2 or 3, and only if you have at least 5 tradable relics.
column3: Trade one of your Relics for a random Relic.
Notes: Each option names the random relic, so you know exactly what you are trading for. This includes both the relic you are trading away, and the relic you are receiving.

column3: Trade one of your Relics for a random Relic.
Trade one of your Relics for a random Relic.

Event:
Room Full of Cheese
Can only occur in Acts 1 or 2
column3: Choose 2 of 8 random Common cards to add to your Deck.
Lose 14 HP. Obtain the Chosen Cheese.

Event: Self-Help Book
column3: Choose a Power to Enchant with Swift 2.
Notes: Swift: The first time you play this card, draw X cards.

column3: Choose a Skill to Enchant with Nimble 2.
Notes: Nimble: Increases Block gained from this card by X.

column3: Choose an Attack to Enchant with Sharp 2.
Notes: Sharp: Increases damage from this card by X.

Event:
Slippery Bridge
Can only appear on floor 7 or later and only if you have a removable card.
column3: A random card is removed from your Deck.
Notes:
Initial card cannot be a Basic card if you have removable non-Basic cards.

Cannot offer to remove the same card multiple times unless it has already offered to remove all other cards in your deck at least once. Cannot offer to remove the same type of card two times in a row (e.g. strike -> defend -> different strike is allowed but strike -> different strike isn't).

column3: Lose 3+ HP. The card in the above option is randomized.
Notes: HP cost goes up by 1 every time Hold On is selected.

Event:
Stone of All Time
Can only occur in Act 2, and only if you have a potion.
column3: Lose a random Potion. Gain 10 Max HP.
Lose 6 HP. Enchant an Attack with Vigorous 8.
Notes: Vigorous: The first time this card is played, it deals X additional damage.

Event:
Symbiote
Can only occur in Acts 2 or 3
column3: Enchant an Attack with Corrupted.
Notes: Corrupted: Deal 50% more damage, but lose 2 HP.

column3: Choose a card to Transform.

Event:
Tea Master
Can only occur in Acts 1 or 2, and only if you have at least 150 gold
column3: Pay 50 Gold. In the next combat, upgrade your starting hand.
Pay 150 Gold. Gain 4 strength in the next 5 combats.
Add 2 Dazed to the draw pile in your next combat.

Event:
The Future of Potions?
Can only occur if you have at least 2 potions.
column3: Lose a (rarity) Potion. Obtain an Upgraded (rarity) attack/skill/power.
Notes: 3 random potions are chosen from your belt. The rarity of the potion determines the rarity of the upgraded card reward.

Event:
The Legends Were True
Can only occur in Act 1, and only if you have more than 0 cards in your deck and at least 10 HP.
column3: Receive the Spoils Map.
Lose 8 HP. Procure 1 random Potion.

Event: This or That?
column3: Lose 6 HP. Gain 41 - 69 Gold.
Add Clumsy to your Deck. Obtain a random Relic.

Event:
War Historian, Repy
Always occurs in the first event if and only if you have the Lantern Key.
column3: Lose Lantern Key. Obtain History Course.
Notes: If you have multiple Lantern Keys, you can choose both options.

column3: Lose Lantern Key. Procure 2 random Potions. Obtain 2 random Relics.

Event:
Welcome to Wongo's
Can only occur in Act 2, and only if you have at least 100 gold.
column3: Pay 100 Gold. Obtain 1 random Common Relic.
Pay 200 Gold. Obtain a random Relic.
Notes: Featured Item random relic is named in the option, so you can know what you are paying for in advance. It cannot be a relic that generates gold.

column3: Pay 300 Gold. Obtain 3 random Relics after 5 combats.
Downgrade a random card.
